options.name: -corner
options.description: for corner cell row, always one site row BL BR TR TL

options.name: -deriveByCells
options.description: create io row for all io cells in design.

options.name: -deriveBySelection
options.description: create IO row from selected cells

options.name: -endOffset
options.description: distance from die edge for end of IO row

options.name: -length
options.description: row lenght starting from die edge or -beginOffset val.

options.name: -nrSites
options.description: row length in number of site.

options.name: -orientation
options.description: row orientation, can be one of R0, R90, R180, R270

options.name: -rowMargin
options.description: distance from row edge to die edge.

options.name: -side
options.description: if no side is specified, 1 row on each side (S,E,N,and W) will be created.

options.name: -xOffset
options.description: distance of left or right edge of corner row to die edge.

options.name: -yOffset
options.description: distance of top or bottom edge of corner row to die edge.
